name: python3-filebytes
title: python3-filebytes
summary: Library to read and edit files in ELF, PE, MachO and OAT (Python 3)
description:
Library to read and edit files in ELF, PE, MachO and OAT (Python 3)
This package contains a library to read and edit files in the following
formats: Executable and Linking Format (ELF), Portable Executable (PE), MachO
and OAT (Android Runtime).
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-filebytes because Library to read and edit files in ELF, PE, MachO and OAT (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-filebytes as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-filebytes with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-filebytes --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
